€100m Arsenal target Ferguson still the 'whole package' despite struggles
arts.sum: Brighton coach Fabian Hurzeler knows that Evan Ferguson still has massive potential despite his recent difficulties. According to his new boss Fabian Hurzeler, Ferguson has nothing to prove despite his recent struggles.

arts.ttl: Interesting detail now spotted in photo Arsenal just posted, fans surely annoyed - opinion
Rap icon Jay-Z 'could help fund Everton takeover' despite previously declaring himself as an Arsenal fan
arts.sum: Jay-Z - who is married to fellow superstar Beyonce - is said to be worth around £2billion. He already has multiple business interests, including Roc Nation, Rocawear and Roc-A-Fella Records.
